chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The sneezing and the Naming (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول أو ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/558)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول أو ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/558)
text: قَالَ الْعُطَاسُ يَنْفَعُ فِي الْبَدَنِ كُلِّهِ مَا لَمْ يَزِدْ عَلَى الثَّلَاثِ فَإِذَا زَادَ عَلَى الثَّلَاثِ فَهُوَ دَاءٌ وَ سُقْمٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Musa, from Yaqoub Bi Yazeed, from Usman Bin Isa, from Abdul Samad Bin Bashir, from Huzeyfa Bin Mansour,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A sneeze is beneficial in the body, all of it, for as long as it does not increase upon the three (sneezes). So when it does exceed upon the three, so it is an illness and a disease’.
en.sarwar: 20. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Musa from Ya’qub ibn Yazid from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from ‘Abd al-Samad ibn Bash ‘Amir from Hudhayfah ibn Mansur from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Sneezing is beneficial to all parts of the body if it is not more than three times, if it is more than three times then it is an illness and disease.’”
